allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "nothing on 5000" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "STILL IN USE" } else { Write-Output "PORT 5000 FREE" })

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const before=db.prepare\('SELECT key,label FROM job_templates'\).all\(\);console.log\('Before:',JSON.stringify\(before.map\(r=>r.key\)\)\);const info=db.prepare\(\\"DELETE FROM job_templates WHERE key IN \('burner_retrofit','controls_retrofit'\)\\"\).run\(\);console.log\('Deleted rows:',info.changes\);const after=db.prepare\('SELECT key FROM job_templates'\).all\(\);console.log\('After:',JSON.stringify\(after.map\(r=>r.key\)\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT key,label,nodes FROM map_layouts'\).all\(\);rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.key, '->', r.nodes\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);db.prepare\(\\"UPDATE map_layouts SET nodes='[]' WHERE key='machine_shop'\\"\).run\(\);console.log\('reset machine_shop'\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT key,label,area FROM map_layouts ORDER BY order_index'\).all\(\);rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.key,'|',r.label,'|',r.area\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const r=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT key,label,area FROM map_layouts WHERE key LIKE 'welding_bay%'\\"\).get\(\);console.log\(r?JSON.stringify\(r\):'not found'\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT key,label FROM map_layouts ORDER BY order_index'\).all\(\);rows.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.key,'|',r.label\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);db.prepare\(\\"UPDATE items SET area='main_shop', rack_letter='B', rack_level=3 WHERE id=1\\"\).run\(\);const r=db.prepare\('SELECT id,name,area,rack_letter,rack_level FROM items WHERE id=1'\).get\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);db.prepare\('DELETE FROM items WHERE id=2'\).run\(\);db.prepare\(\\"UPDATE items SET area=NULL, rack_letter=NULL, rack_level=NULL WHERE id=1\\"\).run\(\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT id,name,area,rack_letter,rack_level FROM items'\).all\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const r=db.prepare\('SELECT id,name,photo_url,photos FROM items WHERE id=1'\).get\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r\)\);db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('data/inventory.db'\);const photos=JSON.stringify\(['/uploads/1779648157926-2rrjfrc4luv.jpeg','/uploads/1779648203020-k9wlcwdir6q.jpeg']\);db.prepare\('UPDATE items SET photos=? WHERE id=1'\).run\(photos\);console.log\('set photos:',photos\);db.close\(\);")
